main.title: Welcome to Fit Lab
main.description: The AI image generation platform for your clothing brand. Explore the sections below to get started.

generator.title: Generator
generator.description: Generate new model images using your garments. Adjust prompts, select models, and dimensions.

collections.title: Collections
collections.description: View and manage the images you have generated. Grouped by generation batch. Remember to download them within 7 days.

library.title: Library
library.description: Your personal gallery. Upload, organize, and classify your garment and reference model images to use them in the generator.

descriptions.title: Descriptions
descriptions.description: Select your images and generate persuasive descriptions automatically using AI (Coming soon).

retention_warning.title: Image retention notice
retention_warning.description: Remember that all generated images will be automatically deleted from our servers one week (7 days) after their creation. Make sure to download the ones you want to keep.

generator.title: Generator
generator.description: Configure your prompt and select garments and models to generate new images.

collections.title: Collections
collections.description: History of generations grouped by batch. Click on an image to open the viewer.

library.title: Library
library.description: Manage your garments and reference models.

descriptions.title: Descriptions
descriptions.description: Select your images and automatically generate persuasive descriptions using AI (Coming soon).
